achievements: First laparoscopic surgeon from Amravati district
professional_summary: Dr. Anil Sawarkar is a seasoned Infertility and IVF Specialist with over 14 years of experience, recognized for his expertise in laparoscopic surgeries and IVF treatments. He is the Founder & Director of Sawarkar Infertility TestTube Baby and laparoscopy center, and has performed more than 12,000 laparoscopic sterilization surgeries. His practice is marked by professionalism, successful treatments, and a supportive environment for patients.
